author: Löwenherz
title: Crashes after in-App Purchase
content: The User Interface and the Feature Set look promising. However the app crashes always after the start of the in-App purchase. Cannot complete the premium purchase. Installed and deleted within ten minutes.

author: WSH5659
title: Inutile
content: Si plusieurs CD toutes les pistes numéro 1,2,3,… à la suite et non pas les CD 1,2,3,… à la suite
